notes: UK DD/MM/YYYY — valid format (JS parses MM/DD so may reject or swap)
Natural language date — should be flagged
Short natural language — should be flagged
Invalid text in date field — must be rejected
Excel serial number — must be rejected (ND-04)
yes/no in date field — must be rejected
Missing required expiry_date and completed_date — blank optional fields accepted
Invalid compliance type — must go to needs_review
